description: Hosted MCP gateway for Web3 infra discovery across 20+ networks via one endpoint.
name: love.chain.app/chainlove-mcp

headers.description: Bearer token for Chain.Love MCP authentication
headers.name: Authorization

headers.description: Optional session-scoped credential example for downstream MCP access. This example uses GitHub: send your raw GitHub token in x-chainlove-cred-github. Other downstream MCP credentials can be passed similarly using x-chainlove-cred-<credential_key>.
headers.name: x-chainlove-cred-github

title: Chain.Love MCP
